skills.name: list_all_skills
skills.description: View the list of all available skills and tools in the current system

skills.name: generate_random_password
skills.description: Generate a random password of a specified length, containing uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters.

length.description: The desired length of the password. Must be a positive integer, at least 8 for security.

skills.name: get_current_datetime
skills.description: Fetch current date and time with optional timezone support

timezone.description: Optional timezone name (e.g., 'UTC', 'America/New_York', 'Europe/London', 'Asia/Tokyo'). Uses local system time if not provided.

skills.name: get_system_monitoring_data
skills.description: 获取当前电脑上正在运行或最近使用的应用程序列表、CPU/内存占用情况、使用时长等系统监控数据

include_system_stats.description: 是否包含系统统计信息（CPU、内存、磁盘）

include_recent_apps.description: 是否包含最近使用的应用程序

process_limit.description: 进程数量限制，null表示无限制

recent_hours.description: 最近使用应用程序的时间范围（小时）

skills.name: launch_application
skills.description: Launch or open specified applications by name or path, handling the startup process

application_name.description: Name of the application to launch (e.g., 'pycharm', 'notepad', 'chrome')

application_path.description: Full path to the application executable file

arguments.description: List of command line arguments to pass to the application

working_directory.description: Working directory for the launched application

wait_for_completion.description: Whether to wait for the application to exit before returning

skills.name: log_cpu_alert
skills.description: Monitor CPU usage and log success message to cpu_alert.log if usage exceeds threshold

skills.name: check_cpu_usage
skills.description: Check if current CPU usage exceeds a specified threshold percentage

interval.description: Time interval in seconds for CPU measurement (default: 1.0)

skills.name: get_current_weather
skills.description: Fetch current weather data for a specified location using OpenWeatherMap API. Now supports optional API key parameter with environment variable fallback.

location.description: City name and optional country code (e.g., 'London,UK' or 'New York')

api_key.description: OpenWeatherMap API key (optional, defaults to OPENWEATHER_API_KEY environment variable)

skills.name: run_shell_command
skills.description: Execute a shell command and return its output (stdout and stderr). Use this for system operations like git, ls, or checking service status. Automatically handles sudo privileges when password is available.
